search_document:
User Request: Customer distribution by country.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Customer Distribution by Country
Type: chart
Description: Visual representation of customer distribution across different countries
Title: Customers by Region
Type: table
Description: Summary of customers grouped by region
Title: Total Number of Customers
Type: kpi
Description: Total count of customers across all countries

sql_queries.title: Customer Distribution by Country
sql_queries.description: Visual representation of customer distribution across different countries
sql_queries.sql: SELECT "Country", COUNT("CustomerID") AS "CustomerCount" FROM "Customers" GROUP BY "Country" ORDER BY "CustomerCount" DESC

sql_queries.title: Customers by Region
sql_queries.description: Summary of customers grouped by region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT "Region", COUNT("CustomerID") AS "CustomerCount" FROM "Customers" GROUP BY "Region" ORDER BY "CustomerCount" DESC

sql_queries.title: Total Number of Customers
sql_queries.description: Total count of customers across all countries
